agents.name: sports-club-schedule
agents.description: Retrieve and summarise upcoming fixtures, match results, and club event schedules.

agents.name: meal-planner
agents.description: Generate weekly meal plans with recipes and produce a consolidated grocery shopping basket for online ordering.

agents.name: home-assistant-helper
agents.description: Query and control smart home devices, automations, and dashboards via a Home Assistant instance.

agents.name: bin-roundup-lookup
agents.description: Look up upcoming bin collection dates and types for a given address from the local council schedule.

agents.name: news-aggregator
agents.description: Aggregate and summarise the latest headlines from multiple news sources into a concise daily briefing.

agents.name: software-alerts
agents.description: Monitor software release feeds and security advisories, surfacing critical updates and CVEs for tracked packages.

agents.name: wishlist-tracker
agents.description: Track items across wishlists, monitor price changes, and notify when items drop below a target threshold.
